title: Best Strategy Overview — Data Contract
p94c_note: PR #222 open as of 2026-05-27. DAILY_539 tab will show SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE until artifact available.

design_decisions.decision: Rankings belong in 最佳策略總覽, not the raw historical replay list
Raw replay list remains for draw-by-draw prediction-vs-actual audit
Benchmark JSONs (P94A/P94B/P94C) are the canonical source for ranking data
Adapter/prediction runner is the source for next-period numbers
Rejected/offline strategies may appear in benchmark ranking with caveat
Rejected/offline strategies must not be default next-number recommendation unless operator enables replay_only_mode
Unsupported bet-count cases must show UNSUPPORTED_BET_COUNT, never fabricated numbers
POWER_LOTTO special number must be shown separately (predicted_special)
DAILY_539 has no special number (predicted_special: null)
BIG_LOTTO has 6 main numbers, no special (predicted_special: null)

ranking_card_schema.description: Schema for each card in the 最佳策略總覽 ranking grid

row_backed.description: true if strategy has production replay rows in DB

benchmark_only.description: true if strategy appears in benchmark but has no production rows

adapter_generated.description: true if metrics computed from adapter simulation (not DB rows)

sample_size.description: Number of draws evaluated in this window

m3plus_rate.description: Fraction of draws with 3+ main number hits

avg_hit_count.description: Average main number hits per draw

m4plus_rate.description: Fraction of draws with 4+ main number hits

m5_rate.description: Fraction of draws with 5+ main number hits

m6_rate.description: Fraction of draws with 6 main number hits (BIG_LOTTO only)

special_hit_rate.description: Fraction of draws where special ball was hit (POWER_LOTTO only; null for BIG_LOTTO and DAILY_539)

stability_score.description: 1 - std/mean of m3plus_rate across windows; null if <2 windows with sample_size>=30

next_prediction_schema.description: Schema for the next-period prediction panel on each ranking card

next_draw_number.description: Expected draw number for next period; null if unknown

predicted_bets.description: Array of bet arrays. null if generation_status != READY

predicted_special.description: Special ball per bet for POWER_LOTTO. null for BIG_LOTTO and DAILY_539

generation_status.description: READY=predictions available; ADAPTER_MISSING=no adapter; UNSUPPORTED_BET_COUNT=adapter cannot produce this bet_count; REJECTED_REPLAY_ONLY=strategy rejected, blocked unless replay_only_mode; SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE=benchmark artifact not yet loaded

disclaimer.const: Benchmark ranking does not guarantee next-draw performance. Past edge is not a predictor of future returns.

rejected_offline_policy.operator_override: replay_only_mode=true enables next-number generation for rejected/offline strategies
rejected_offline_policy.ui_treatment: yellow warning banner on rejected/offline cards

unsupported_bet_count_policy.ranking_visibility: card still shown with benchmark metrics

warning_flag_triggers.SHORT_WINDOW_ONLY: strategy has data in w30/w100 but missing w500/w1500
warning_flag_triggers.BENCHMARK_ONLY: strategy has no production replay rows in DB
warning_flag_triggers.NO_ADAPTER: no adapter registered for this strategy
warning_flag_triggers.UNSUPPORTED_BET_COUNT: adapter does not support the requested bet_count

stability_score_formula.formula: 1.0 - std(m3plus_rate across windows with sample_size>=30) / mean(m3plus_rate)

best_strategy_overview_page.footer: Rankings based on historical benchmark. Not financial advice.

frontend.graceful_source_unavailable: DAILY_539 shows SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE until P94C artifact available

recommended_p95_implementation.benchmark_refresh: auto-updates when new P94A/B/C artifact is produced
